name: Music Hub — Reporte Semanal por Artista

parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id AS tenant_id,
  a.nombre_artistico,
  a.telegram_chat_id,
  a.genero_musical,
  COUNT(DISTINCT af.fan_id) FILTER (WHERE af.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS fans_nuevos_semana,
  COUNT(DISTINCT af.fan_id) AS fans_total,
  COALESCE(SUM(af.puntos), 0) AS puntos_total_fans,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) FILTER (WHERE e.fecha_evento >= NOW() AND e.fecha_evento <= NOW() + INTERVAL '30 days') AS eventos_proximos,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS contrataciones_semana
FROM artists a
LEFT JOIN artist_fans af ON af.tenant_id = a.tenant_id
LEFT JOIN artist_events e ON e.tenant_id = a.tenant_id
LEFT JOIN artist_contrataciones c ON c.tenant_id = a.tenant_id
WHERE a.activo = true AND a.telegram_chat_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY a.id, a.nombre_artistico, a.telegram_chat_id, a.genero_musical
ORDER BY fans_nuevos_semana DESC

parameters.name: messages
